overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking along a forest dirt path at night during a storm. The character passes wooden signposts and ancient stone ruins while rain begins to fall, with the camera following steadily from behind.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through the dark forest, approaching stone ruins in the distance

thick bushes and undergrowth lining the right side of the path
tall wooden post with horizontal beams on the left side of the trail
ancient stacked stone ruins visible in the distance on the right

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night, with Geralt walking forward along a narrow dirt path. Dense vegetation lines the right side while a wooden signpost stands on the left. In the distance, ancient stone ruins become visible through the trees as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail alongside ancient stone wall

events.description: stone wall becomes prominent on the right side as the character draws near

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the path, now walking parallel to the stone ruins on the right

entered.detail: trees with white blossoms visible beyond the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character passes the wooden signpost and draws alongside the ancient stone wall ruins on the right. The wall, made of stacked gray stones, runs parallel to the path while flowering trees become visible in the background. The atmosphere remains dark and foreboding.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy forest trail with stone ruins and flowering trees

events.description: rain begins to fall visibly, creating streaks across the screen

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the rain, passing by the stone wall and flowering trees

entered.detail: visible rain streaks falling through the air

segments.scene_description: Rain begins to fall as Geralt continues along the path, with visible streaks descending through the dark atmosphere. The stone wall remains prominent on the right while flowering trees with white blossoms draw closer. The scene maintains a moody, stormy ambiance throughout the walk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dark forest trail that transitions from a quiet night walk into a moody, rain-swept journey. It begins with Geralt walking forward on a narrow dirt path, passing a wooden signpost as ancient stone ruins emerge from the dense vegetation in the distance. As the character advances, the camera draws alongside a long wall of stacked gray stones that runs parallel to the path, revealing flowering trees in the background. The scene then shifts as rain begins to fall in visible streaks through the dark atmosphere, intensifying the foreboding mood. Finally, the walk continues past the prominent stone wall as the white blossoms of the flowering trees draw closer under the stormy sky.
